rounds.revealFact: Joan of Arc, a teenage peasant who said she heard the voices of saints, rallied French armies during the Hundred Years' War before being captured and burned at the stake.

image.alt: Painting of red-coated soldiers making a desperate stand against a mass of warriors with shields and spears below a steep hill

attribution.author: Charles Edwin Fripp

clues: A modern imperial army, confident in its rifles, was overwhelmed by a far larger force using speed, spears, and a sweeping encirclement.
The disaster was one of the worst ever suffered by that empire at the hands of a technologically weaker foe.

followUpQuestion.prompt: Which country gave this statue as a gift?

rounds.prompt: The Spanish Armada is defeated in its attempt to invade England.
rounds.revealFact: The defeat of the Spanish Armada in 1588 marked the rise of English sea power and the waning of Spanish naval dominance.

rounds.prompt: Where did one of the world's first great cities stand, laid out on a brick grid with covered drains, its writing still undeciphered today?
rounds.revealFact: Mohenjo-daro was one of the largest cities of the Indus Valley Civilization, remarkable for its planned streets and drainage more than 4,000 years ago.
